description: A smaller plastic airbag lined with solar panels and filled with hydrogen gas.  Provides lift if installed on a vehicle, but you'll need a propeller to do anything more than float up and down.
//: Realistically, each kg of lift would take about a cubic meter but that's literally the tile volume limit and we'd need 30 of those, so stick to a value actually allowed to exist.

description: A big plastic airbag lined with solar panels and filled with hydrogen gas.  Provides lift if installed on a vehicle, but you'll need a propeller to do anything more than float up and down.
//: Realistically, each kg of lift would take about a cubic meter but that's literally the tile volume limit and we'd need 30 of those, so stick to a value actually allowed to exist.

description: A section of aircraft wing made of carbon fiber fabric, with a thin solar panel layered over the top, over ridid carbon fiber ribs and stringers.  Wings allow a vehicle to fly, but require a propeller and enough velocity to take off.

//: To be made reloadable normally once I get compressed liquids in game
description: A small metal tank designed to store compressed hydrogen. Can only be refilled when properly installed in a vehicle
